note: City-board deck (Wheel follows Roads), the mission's balance reference. The goal/threat scale on territory *gained* since setup, so on the City board (starts at 2) the win is 8 absolute and the Overextension drain is toll-free on the opening 2. Road (money+production) and Conquest (military) are the territory faucets; Dogs feeds Conquest's military, Trader funds Road's money, Forge and the foraging/toolmaking works keep food and production ahead of the drain. ~60% under the planner, oracle-winnable 100% — a solid fair-play band. (The Chiefdom board starts at 0 territory and is far harder; that gap is a board-level issue, left open.)
